mission.title: open-cluster-management: [spoke] Add ConfigMap watching and TLS configuration
mission.description: [spoke] Add ConfigMap watching and TLS configuration. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current open-cluster-management deployment
steps.description:
Verify your open-cluster-management version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n open-cluster-management -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-cluster-management
helm list -n open-cluster-management 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working open-cluster-management installation.

steps.title: Review open-cluster-management configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant open-cluster-management configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n open-cluster-management -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-cluster-management
kubectl get configmap -n open-cluster-management -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-cluster-management
```
Scope: Both klusterlet-operator AND components running on the managed cluster deployed by it

Tasks:

steps.title: Apply the fix for [spoke] Add ConfigMap watching and TLS configuration
steps.description:
## Overview
This PR adds support for configuring TLS profiles (cipher suites and minimum TLS version) for spoke cluster components (registration-agent, work-agent, and singleton agent) deployed by klusterlet-operator.

#1437 (parent issue) and #1445 (spoke TLS configuration)

## Scope
This implementation enables users to set TLS cipher suites and algorithm for spoke agents' TLS configuration.

### In Progress / TODO:
- [*] Add `TLSMinVersion` and `TLSCipherSuites` fields to Klusterlet CRD spec

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Upgrade open-cluster-management to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade open-cluster-management:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade open-cluster-management open-cluster-management/open-cluster-management --namespace open-cluster-management
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n open-cluster-management
helm list -n open-cluster-management
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n open-cluster-management -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-cluster-management
kubectl get events -n open-cluster-management --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[spoke] Add ConfigMap watching and TLS configuration" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
## Overview
This PR adds support for configuring TLS profiles (cipher suites and minimum TLS version) for spoke cluster components (registration-agent, work-agent, and singleton agent) deployed by klusterlet-operator.

#1437 (parent issue) and #1445 (spoke TLS configuration)

## Scope
This implementation enables users to set TLS cipher suites and algorithm for spoke agents' TLS configuration.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with open-cluster-management installed or the issue environment reproducible.
